text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while Satono Diamond is running
around campus...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I don't think I've ever seen this part of
the academy...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's probably okay. If I just keep running, I'm sure
I'll get my bearings.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Where am I? I seem to be completely lost...

Don't fret, Satono. For I shall show you the path
you must take.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! Am I glad to see you! Will you show me
how to get back to the academy?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen?
text_block_list.text:
No... I will show you something much better than
that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen?
text_block_list.text:
If you come with me, I shall shape you into the
greatest Umamusume to ever run. You shall
follow in my footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well... Um, I appreciate the offer, but I'm just
trying to get back to school...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen B
text_block_list.text:
Don't fall for it! I am the one you must follow,
Satono!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen B
text_block_list.text:
Down this road lies all the sweet desserts in the
world, yours for the taking! Come with me... down
the rocky road!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen A
text_block_list.text:
What an irresponsible thing to say! Don't listen to
her, Satono! The proper thing to do is to come
with me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...I appreciate your kindness, McQueens. But, I'm
afraid I can't follow either of you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Desserts are certainly delicious, and I admire and
respect you both from the bottom of my heart.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
However... my dream isn't to become you. The
proper course for me is...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
To shine brighter than anyone else and carve my
name into history in my own way!

text_block_list.name: McQueens
text_block_list.text:
Satono?!
I implore you to reconsi—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Huh?
Is this... the academy?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, Satono. Your trainer is looking for you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank you for telling me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Where was I just now? I don't really know, but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I can see the path I need to take more
clearly than before.
